channel.title: AI on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Eric Spencer

item.title: Claude Architect Quiz
item.description: Free flashcards and practice quiz for the Anthropic Claude Certified Architect exam.

item.title: ChatTLA+ Dataset
item.description: The dataset release for the ChatTLA+ paper — SFT corpus and benchmark for TLA+ spec generation, posted anonymized for blind review.

item.title: COMP 388 LLM Homework
item.description: Two homeworks from Loyola's special-topics LLMs class: prompting GPT-2 and comparing base vs instruction-tuned Qwen.

item.title: ChatTLA+
item.description: Presentation on using LLMs for TLA+ formal specification generation and verification.

item.title: Reinforcement Learning Connect 4 Bot
item.description: An AI agent that learns to play Connect 4 through self-play reinforcement learning.

item.title: Loyola ITS RAG Bot
item.description: A voice-first RAG chatbot trained on Loyola's ITS knowledge base, built after two years of answering the same tickets.

item.title: Yeat Large Language Model
item.description: Fine tuning GPT-2 to talk like Yeat

item.title: RVC Artist Model
item.description: Voice conversion models for different artists using Retrieval-based Voice Conversion (RVC).

item.title: Founder
item.description: Lightweight AI-assisted stock analysis and portfolio helper for hobby traders.

item.title: TLA+ Formal Generation
item.description: Early exploratory repo for generating TLA+ specs from natural-language requirements with an LLM, with a TLC harness wired in. The scaffold that eventually grew into ChatTLA+.

item.title: Training an LLM on ASCII
item.description: A toy transformer that reads pyfiglet ASCII art and tries to spit the original word back out. Calling it an LLM is generous.

item.title: AIs Talking Philosophy
item.description: A toy where two local Ollama models loop on consciousness until one of them gives up

item.title: How to tell if written work is AI
item.description: Easily tell if something is AI using these obvious giveaways

item.title: AI OS
item.description: An experimental AI-centric operating system exploring tight integration between AI and system-level operations.

item.title: AI Sign Language Interpreter
item.description: A Simple Sign Language Recognition App using OpenCV

item.title: flatten-repo VSC Extension
item.description: A VS Code extension I made when I kept running out of Copilot credits — flattens a repo into one .txt file you can paste into a free LLM.

item.title: MLB Hall of Fame Predictor
item.description: A scikit-learn decision tree that guesses whether a current MLB player would get voted into Cooperstown, built for the Google Cloud x MLB hackathon.

item.title: Terminal GPT
item.description: A small Python CLI for chatting with OpenAI and running English-to-Bash commands from the terminal. The thing I actually open when I want to talk to a model.

item.title: Movie Recommendation Website
item.description: A movie recommendation website developed as part of the Loyola AI Club's Fall 2024 project.

item.title: Jr. AI Prompt Engineer
item.description: Created and refined prompts for ChatGPT-4 to meet specific criteria and improve output quality.
